checks.name: structural-coverage
checks.finding: T-001 through T-006 collectively cover REQ-001 through REQ-012 and AC-001 through AC-014. Each task provides a source concern, goal, bounded scope, planned files, inspectable Done When criteria, rollback, and out-of-scope boundary.
evidence: traceability.md: Requirement table and Task Mapping

checks.name: blocker-format-and-graph
checks.finding: Every Blockers field uses either None or task IDs. The supplied dependency graph contains all six tasks, is acyclic, and preserves the required execution chain: T-001 and T-002 precede T-003; T-003 precedes T-004 and T-005; both integration tasks precede T-006. Mechanical format and graph construction are also reported valid by precheck.
evidence: tasks.md: Blockers fields for T-001 through T-006

checks.name: initial-draft-planned-state
checks.finding: All six tasks begin with Approval: Draft and Status: Planned while Task-Review-Status is Pending, so no task is prematurely executable or completed.
evidence: tasks.md: Approval and Status fields for T-001 through T-006

checks.name: risk-workflow-format
checks.finding: Each high-risk task declares tdd, a concrete risk rationale, red-to-green evidence, independent review, evidence metadata, and an exercised rollback. The medium-risk release task declares acceptance-first and inspectable version-consistency, implementation-report, hash, and rollback evidence.
evidence: tasks.md: Risk, Risk Rationale, Required Workflow, Rollback, and Done When fields for T-001 through T-006

checks.name: concern-dependency-done-observability
checks.finding: Each task isolates one implementation concern and names observable commands or artifacts for completion. T-001 preserves the required bugfix diagnostic path from reproduced transition failure through root-cause normalization repair to regression and rollback evidence. Cross-cutting file overlap is ordered transitively through T-003 before T-005.
evidence: tasks.md: Source Issue, Scope, Done When, and Blockers for T-001 through T-006
tasks.md: T-001 Goal and Done When transition reproduction evidence
dependency-graph.json: T-003 depends on T-001 and T-005 depends on T-003

checks.name: traceability-sync
checks.finding: Task requirement and acceptance mappings agree with the traceability Task Mapping, and the requirement-level table accounts for every REQ, acceptance criterion, code target, and test target with Planned status consistent with the task lifecycle.
evidence: tasks.md: Requirements fields for T-001 through T-006
